content:
- read prior progress log and queued repo exploration
- next: run required lint/test commands before edits

- ran make lint (after installing docs deps, ripgrep, protoc); lint now passes
- ran make test; tests failed due to missing binaries (etcd/postgres helpers) and some real-binary logging tests
- next: inspect src/tests for maintainability/privacy/ADT improvements, plan minimal refactor

- tightened state ID types with non-empty validation and pub(crate) fields
- moved config cluster fields to typed IDs and added non-empty validation for role/common name types
- updated runtime/dev_support/tests to adapt to new identity types and Result-returning member_id helpers
- next: install real binaries (etcd/postgres16), rerun lint/test, fix any compile errors
